description: Create an updatable JSON Relational Duality View named DEPT_EMP_DV in the HR schema exposing Departments and their Employees as a nested 'staff' array. Use this view to provision Department 300 ('Cloud Infrastructure', Location 1700) with employees 3001 (Sanjay Gupta, SGUPTA, IT_PROG) and 3002 (Alisha Wong, AWONG, IT_PROG). Update the Department Name to 'Cloud Operations' and Sanjay's Email to 'SGUPTA_CLOUD' through the view, then export the resulting JSON document for Department 300 to /home/ga/Desktop/cloud_ops.json.
